$source-of-truth: docs/sprint-progress.json. Updated as agents return + commit. Read by apps/portal/Components/Pages/Sprint.razor.
currentSprintNote: Sprint 13 shipped 2026-04-30 (T2 edge auth a5f7344, T3 §6.11 e7cf83d, T1 live-deploy staging 71caeb0; 253/253 tests). **Plan-mode walk 2026-05-02 reframed Sprint 14+ scope:** added VP6 AnalysisService N:N to vision; promoted P2-FU-multi-event-types to must-have-pilot; locked 6-9 month deadline; locked all-v1-parity for inspection module (~13-18 sprints across Batches B1-B8); locked three-module pilot (inspection v2-native + NickFinance v1-clone + NickHR cloned now); §6.1 Florence-2 OCR is pilot scope; §6.2/3/4/6/8/9/10 post-pilot. Sprint 14 = AnalysisService VP6 (per plan-file §10). Detailed dispatch sequence + v1 parity breakdown + ML training arc + pilot-site decision matrix in ~/.claude/plans/tingly-launching-quasar.md §10-§13.

resolvedDecisions.title: ITenantContext.SetSystemContext mechanism
resolvedDecisions.resolution: option 2 — explicit IsSystem flag + SetSystemContext() + sentinel '-1' + per-table RLS opt-in clauses + system-context audit register

rollingMasterScope.drainableNote: Empty as of 2026-04-30 (Sprint 13 shipped at 71caeb0). Plan-mode walk 2026-05-02 produced a structured Sprint 14+ pre-pilot scope (~31-45 sprints): see plan-file §10 (dispatch sequence), §11 (v1 parity breakdown B1-B8), §12 (ML training arc for §6.1), §13 (pilot-site decision matrix). Sprint 14 dispatches AnalysisService VP6. The 5 staged SQL scripts at tools/migrations/sprint-13-deploy/ are awaiting operator psql application.

gated.reason: Sprint 13 T1 staged 32 migrations across 3 DBs but does NOT auto-apply. Operator runs psql per docs/runbooks/07-sprint-13-live-deploy.md when ready. Until then, every shipped migration since Sprint 5 is still on disk-only for nickerp_platform + nickerp_nickfinance; nickerp_inspection has the 5 Sprint-12 image-analysis migrations applied + 9 deltas pending.

outOfScope.reason: GPU-time training runs for the container-split student, OCR Florence-2 fine-tune, and §6.2 anomaly-detection PatchCore fitting are out-of-band of any chat session. Scaffolds + label exports + 1-epoch smoke runs landed in Sprint 12; real training is the user's responsibility on a GPU box.

history.name: Edge auth + image-analysis post-hoc adapter + live-deploy migration backlog

items.title: P2-FU-edge-auth — per-edge-node API keys + rotation flow + handler swap (4 commits a3e7c6a/a0c81f1/cef5c5b/046a979). +17 tests (225 total). Audit register entry landed at a5f7344 alongside merge.

Image-analysis §6.11 — post-hoc outcome adapter (5 commits 4bc8b1e/f1f7622/08ee0e9/d9c6ab5/66647ce). Pull worker + 4-phase rollout state machine (DevEvalManualOnly/Shadow/PrimaryPlus5PctAudit/Primary) + manual-entry stub + reconciliation cursor. Pure entity reuse — no new tables, NoOp snapshot migration only. Worker uses SetTenant (not SetSystemContext). Supersession via append-only AuthorityDocument rows. +28 tests (253 total).

Live-deploy migration backlog staging (2 commits 206c8b3/e7dbcc8). 5 SQL scripts + runbook 07 (~750 lines). Structural correction: 3 DBs (nickerp_platform / nickerp_nickfinance / nickerp_inspection) × 5 schemas, not 5 DBs as in original brief. 32 migrations to apply on first run; 5 already applied to inspection (Sprint 12). 3 irreversible migrations called out. **NOT auto-applied** — operator runs psql.

ratifications.title: Phase naming follows entity values (DevEvalManualOnly/Shadow/PrimaryPlus5PctAudit/Primary), not the brief's speculative Disabled/Shadow/Active/Authoritative
v2 DB layout corrected to 3 physical DBs × 5 schemas during T1 (was assumed 5 DBs in the brief)

items.title: Plumbing + Inference plugin family + tooling (89 files / 15,569 insertions: design doc, 5 R3 entities, 2 applied migrations, Application project, 4 Inference csprojs, IInboundOutcomeAdapter, ThresholdAdminService, smoke tests, Python tooling, stub ONNX exports, PLAN.md §21). 208/208 tests after fix-forward.

items.title: §6.5 admin UI + §7.0 contract bumps (8 files / 451 insertions: Thresholds.razor, DualViewGeometry.cs, ScannerCapabilities additions [RawChannelsAvailable / SupportsDualView / SupportsDicosExport / SupportsCalibrationMode], ExternalSystemCapabilities additions [SupportsOutcomePull / SupportsOutcomePush], ParsedArtifact.FormatVersion, ContractVersion 1.1→1.2 on Scanners + ExternalSystems Abstractions, ROADMAP §4.9, ARCHITECTURE cross-link). All additions appended with safe defaults — no caller breakage. 208/208 tests.

AnalysisService VP6 — N:N location↔service entity + junction + immutable 'All Locations' default + first-claim-wins under shared visibility + admin UI. Tenant-configurable case visibility (shared/exclusive) and user multi-membership (allowed/one-only).

followups.title: Clone NickHR from v1 into ERP V2 tree using NickFinance v1-clone pattern. Co-deploy with inspection + NickFinance for three-module pilot. Refactor to v2-native architecture is post-pilot (~6-10 sprints).
followups.severity: must-have-pilot (Sprint 15; ~1-2 sprints clone, post-pilot refactor displaced)

followups.title: Extend ExternalSystemInstance binding from binary 'single OR shared' to 'single OR subset-of-locations OR shared' via junction table. Mirrors VP6 N:N pattern. Admin UI exposes the choice at onboarding.
OCR accuracy eval tool: offline harness (establishes v1 Tesseract baseline) + production drift-monitor + admin Razor page at /admin/ocr-accuracy. Gates Florence-2 (§6.1) production deployment.

Tenant lifecycle: state field + soft-delete with retention window + hard-purge admin action + scoped export tooling + email service for first-user invite via one-time link. Email service does not exist in v2 today.

Operationalise central Postgres cluster: primary + streaming standby with manual failover, pgbackrest backups (full + incremental + PITR), lock to PostgreSQL 17. Single-host dev stays single-host until this lands.
Three-module portal navigation — apps/portal links out to inspection.web + finance.web + hr.web with auth flow + shared chrome.
followups.severity: must-have-pilot (Sprint 23; ~1 sprint after NickHR clone lands)

followups.title: Phase V lightweight pre-pilot: targeted security audit + perf/load test scoped to pilot site. Pilot itself is the functional validation; this catches showstoppers.
Pilot site deployment + monitoring setup. Depends on pilot-site selection (decision matrix in plan-file §13). Tentative front-runners: Kotoka or Takoradi.
followups.severity: must-have-pilot (~2-3 sprints; final site call due Sprint 22-24)
